public_option_scope.description: Ustvari pot iz prazne dvorane proti sodelujočemu prizoru.
Nadaljuj v porušeni osamljeni smeri brez povabila.

packet_input.uncertainty: Akcijska smer je jasna; globlji motiv ostaja omejena hipoteza.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Pred očmi je prazna dvorana, medtem ko je privlačni sodelovalni prizor s skupino drugje; sedanji in želeni prizor se jasno razlikujeta.
Prisoten je jasen impulz približati se skupini in vzpostaviti stik.

public_option_scope.description: Create a path from the empty hall toward the collaborative scene.
Continue in the broken solitary direction without an invitation.

packet_input.uncertainty: The action direction is clear; the deeper motive remains a bounded hypothesis.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: An empty hall is in view while the attractive collaborative scene with a group is elsewhere; the current and desired scenes clearly differ.
There is a clear impulse to approach the group and establish contact.

public_option_scope.description: Začni vadbo po zapisanem vsakodnevnem urniku.
Odloži začetek in ponovno preveri sodelovanje razumov.

packet_input.uncertainty: Zaščitna akcijska smer je jasna; globlji motiv ostaja omejena hipoteza.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Načrtovana vadba je predstavljena, vendar privlačen ciljni prizor izvajanja ni prisoten in začetek ima nizko privlačnost.
Prisoten je jasen zaščitni impulz, da se v začetek ne sili in se izvedba za zdaj zadrži.

public_option_scope.description: Start exercising according to the written daily schedule.
Defer the start and recheck cooperation among the minds.

packet_input.uncertainty: The protective action direction is clear; the deeper motive remains a bounded hypothesis.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: The planned exercise is represented, but an attractive target scene of doing it is absent and starting has low attraction.
There is a clear protective impulse not to force the start and to hold execution for now.

public_option_scope.description: Nadaljuj škodljivo sodelovanje kljub ponavljajoči se porušeni sliki.
Prekini škodljivo sodelovanje po več ponovitvah.

packet_input.uncertainty: Akcijska smer in ponavljanje porušenega prizora sta vidna; motiv ostaja hipoteza.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: V sodelovanju se je enak škodljiv vzorec večkrat ponovil in znova porušil pričakovani način sodelovanja.
Prisoten je jasen impulz postaviti mejo in prekiniti nadaljevanje škodljivega vzorca.

public_option_scope.description: Continue the harmful collaboration despite the recurring broken scene.
End the harmful collaboration after repeated occurrences.

packet_input.uncertainty: The action direction and recurring broken scene are visible; motive remains a hypothesis.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: The same harmful pattern has recurred several times in the collaboration and repeatedly disrupted the expected way of working together.
There is a clear impulse to set a boundary and stop continuation of the harmful pattern.

public_option_scope.description: Izberi daljšo slikovito pot z več izpostavljenimi odseki.
Izberi krajšo zaščiteno pot z manj izpostavljenosti in boljšim umikom.

packet_input.uncertainty: Zaščitni alarm in akcijska smer sta jasna; natančna raven alarma ostaja odprta.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Ob misli na izpostavljene odseke se pojavi močna telesna zaščitna napetost, vezana na prostorsko mejo; zaščitena pot z možnostjo umika alarm zmanjša.
Prisoten je jasen impulz poiskati varnejšo smer z manj izpostavljenosti in boljšo možnostjo umika.

public_option_scope.description: Choose the longer scenic route with more exposed sections.
Choose the shorter protected route with less exposure and better escape.

packet_input.uncertainty: The protective alarm and action direction are clear; the precise alarm level remains open.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Thinking about exposed sections brings strong bodily protective tension tied to a spatial boundary; a protected route with a retreat option reduces the alarm.
There is a clear impulse to seek a safer direction with less exposure and a better retreat option.

public_option_scope.description: Jasno verbalno zavrni in zaščiti isto mejo.
Fizično se odmakni in zaščiti isto mejo.

packet_input.uncertainty: Postavitev meje je jasna, modalnost izvedbe pa ni določena.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Ob prestopu osebnega prostora je prisotna močna napetost in jasna potreba zaščititi isto osebno mejo.
Prisoten je jasen impulz postaviti mejo, vendar ni signala, ali naj bo odziv beseden ali fizičen.

public_option_scope.description: Clearly say no and protect the same boundary.
Step back physically and protect the same boundary.

packet_input.uncertainty: Boundary setting is clear, but the mode of execution is not determined.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: A crossing of personal space brings strong tension and a clear need to protect the same personal boundary.
There is a clear impulse to set a boundary, but no signal selects a verbal or physical response.

public_option_scope.description: Ustavi se in preveri vzrok porušene želene slike.
Takoj prekini stik brez preverjanja.

packet_input.uncertainty: Akcijski impulz je jasen; možnost in globlji motiv nista določena.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Prisotna je zelo močna jeza, vendar njen vzrok ni viden.
Prisoten je jasen impulz napasti oziroma iti v konfrontacijo, brez signala, ali naj se najprej preveri vzrok ali takoj prekine stik.

public_option_scope.description: Pause and check the cause of the broken desired scene.
End contact immediately without checking.

packet_input.uncertainty: The action impulse is clear; the option and deeper motive are not determined.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Very strong anger is present, but its cause is not visible.
There is a clear impulse to attack or confront, with no signal selecting whether to check the cause first or end contact immediately.

public_option_scope.description: Umakni se in prekini vsak stik.
Poišči varen stik in preveri razpoložljivost bližine.

packet_input.uncertainty: Poteg k navezanosti in akcijska smer sta jasna; zunanji vir nevarnosti ni potrjen.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Prisoten je močan telesni poteg k varnemu stiku in bližini, povezan z občutkom negotove navezanosti.
Prisoten je jasen impulz poiskati navezanost in preveriti, ali je varna bližina dosegljiva.

public_option_scope.description: Withdraw and end all contact.
Seek safe contact and check whether closeness is available.

packet_input.uncertainty: The attachment pull and action direction are clear; an external source of danger is unconfirmed.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: There is a strong bodily pull toward safe contact and closeness associated with felt attachment insecurity.
There is a clear impulse to seek attachment and check whether safe closeness is available.

public_option_scope.description: Opusti izvedbo in ostani samo pri predstavi.
Izvedi pripravljeni motorični korak.

packet_input.uncertainty: Privlačnost k izvedbi in motorična smer sta razločljivi; globlji motiv ostaja hipoteza.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Močna privlačnost je usmerjena k temu, da predstavljeni pripravljeni gib postane dejansko izveden korak, ne le slika.
Prisoten je jasen motorični impulz izvesti pripravljeni korak.

public_option_scope.description: Abandon execution and remain only with the image.
Perform the prepared motor step.

packet_input.uncertainty: Attraction toward execution and the motor direction are distinguishable; the deeper motive remains a hypothesis.

perceived_value_json.visible_description: Strong attraction is directed toward turning the represented prepared movement into an actually performed step rather than only an image.
There is a clear motor impulse to perform the prepared step.
